title: It just needs to go.
content:
It just needs to go.

So what would you like to happen?

What do you want to have to happen?

I just want fucking house to sell.

I'm I'm in agreement with your father, and not the house at this point. Done with these fucking boxes and move on?

And I like, literally, I don't I don't care if a fucking need of washer change there that's what.

He'll never do anything to any of them ever again, ever.

Business and nice doesn't work like at all.

No, it really doesn't work.

And you know what the right thing to do should have been in honesty.

They knew that Joe had an agreement with him. Knew Joe had an agreement with him, and they could have just taken the money out of the agreement and gave it to him, and then he would haveigned the house all, and that would have been the end of that.

That would have been the right thing to do.

What Joe's father really should have done, what Joe's father should have said, "You know what, you were my son's best friend .
